title: Flaky Comforting Syrian Soya Bean Crumble
description: A floral and comforting dish featuring a flaky soya bean crumble made without eggs, perfect for a breakfast or snack option.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup maple syrup or agave nectar
Juice of 1 lemon (optional for extra tanginess)

instructions: Combine soybeans, flaxseed, maple syrup, and salt in a bowl.
If desired, add a little lemon juice to enhance flavors.
Mix well until the mixture is thick but still can be spread thinly.
Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Using fingers or a spoon, press the mixture into an even layer about 1/2 inch thick on the prepared pan.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for approximately 25 minutes or until golden brown and crisp around the edges.
